LanguageData.VREAOverhaul.CannotConvertAndroid: {PAWN_nameDef} has no ideological subroutine and cannot hold beliefs.
LanguageData.VREAOverhaul.AlertUncontrolledAndroidsDe:
One or more of your mechlike androids has no overseer. Without a mechanitor connected, they stand dormant and cannot work. Connect them to a mechanitor with enough bandwidth to bring them back online.

Unlike mechanoids, an uncontrolled android will never go feral - it simply waits.

The following androids are dormant
